title: SmartHR Accessibility Quality and Process
summary: SmartHR's accessibility quality criteria and delivery process documentation, including testing guidance, low-vision insights, and multilingual quality/process in a Japanese B2B SaaS context. Covers standards at smarthr.design/accessibility/standards-and-process/.
lessons: Extend generic WCAG rules with Japanese product-specific checks: mixed-script typography, text expansion, low-vision usability.
Define accessibility ownership and release gates in the delivery process.
caveats: No page-level update date is exposed; verify process currency against current product releases.
Guidelines are scoped to SmartHR's B2B SaaS context; generalize process patterns without importing product-specific workflows.
licenseNote: Public documentation; verify code/component license separately.
antiImitationNote: Transfer accessibility process rigor and Japanese-context quality checks; do not copy SmartHR product branding or SaaS-specific workflow patterns.
